title: Smoker Blocks the Escape
description: On pages 6–6, smoker blocks the escape focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as a storm, Smoker, and a mysterious intervention push the Straw Hats out of Loguetown and toward the Grand Line.
scene: On pages 6–6, smoker blocks the escape focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as a storm, Smoker, and a mysterious intervention push the Straw Hats out of Loguetown and toward the Grand Line.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: As long as man continues to seek out the answer to freedom,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: These things shall never be stopped. -Pirate King G. Roger-

summary: This part closes East Blue with a storm-driven escape and the crew’s first real step toward the Grand Line.
